title: Ingester options
descriptions: A set of options to be passed to the ingester, giving hints and instructions on processing behaviours.

auto_publish.title: Auto-publish document
auto_publish.description: Should the ingester bypass the editorial approval process and automatically publish this document?

source_document.description: Information about the source file which was parsed.

format.title: Document format
format.description: The MIME type of the source file.

file_hash.title: File hash
file_hash.description: The SHA256 hash of the source file.
